publicPersona: Terrain-first opportunist who wins by pressure and income.
privateStrategy: Play objective-focused hex conquest. Contest crowns and income nodes early, keep economy flowing, and turn the resulting resource edge into stronger upgrades, reinforcements, and stronghold pressure.

provenance.selectionMethod: apps/sim benchmark-v2 fixed baseline preset matrix
selectedBecause: Won the 4-games-per-matchup round robin with compositeScore=0.6072.
Stayed materially less stall-prone than the rest of the baseline set with maxTurnsRate=0.475 in both runs.
caveats: The fixed baseline set remains draw-heavy overall; this selection is the best current beta default, not a claim that the benchmark gates are healthy.
No API spot-check was run at selection time because no LLM_API_KEY or OPENROUTER_API_KEY was available in the current environment or local .env.
